description: Microsoft denies Copilot is only for entertainment purpose, after its own document says do not trust AI  Windows LatestCopilot is ‘for entertainment purposes only,’ according to Microsoft’s terms of use  TechCrunchMicrosoft says Copilot is for entertainment purposes only, not serious use — firm pushing AI hard to consumers and businesses tells users not to rely on it for important advice  Tom's HardwareCopilot Terms Claim Microsoft's AI Is for 'Entertainment Purposes Only'  PCMagMicrosoft Mocked for Terms of Service That Admit Copilot Is for "Entertainment Purposes Only"  Futurism
